  • Constructor Details

    • ActivityTest

      public ActivityTest()

  • Method Details

    • setUp

      public void setUp()

    • testConstructorNoCost

      public void testConstructorNoCost()
      Tests the constructor for an Activity with no cost. Verifies that the name, duration, impacted need, value, and cost are set correctly.

    • testConstructorWithCost

      public void testConstructorWithCost()
      Tests the constructor for an Activity with a cost. Verifies that the name, duration, impacted need, value, and cost are set correctly.

    • testGetName

      public void testGetName()
      Tests the getName method. Ensures that the correct activity names are returned.

    • testGetDuration

      public void testGetDuration()
      Tests the getDuration method. Ensures that the correct activity durations are returned.

    • testGetImpactedNeed

      public void testGetImpactedNeed()
      Tests the getImpactedNeed method. Ensures that the correct impacted needs are returned.

    • testGetValue

      public void testGetValue()
      Tests the getValue method. Ensures that the correct activity values are returned.

    • testGetCost

      public void testGetCost()
      Tests the getCost method. Ensures that the correct activity costs are returned.

    • testPerformActivity

      public void testPerformActivity()
      Tests the performActivity method. Verifies that performing an activity correctly updates the Sim's needs based on the activity's value and the Sim's skill level.
